---
title: "A Guide to the Village of Hursley, the Home of Keble, author of ‘The Christian Year’"
---

## A Guide to the Village of Hursley, the Home of Keble, author of ‘The Christian Year’

**Author:** The Rev. John Frewen Moor
**Date:** 1869
**Imprint:** Winchester: Savage

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
